sections.title: Hand and Portable Power Tool Inspection Checklist
sections.html:
INSPECTION CHECKLIST

INSPECTION CHECKLIST

Inspection frequency: Regular inspections are required for hand and portable power tools to ensure safe operation and compliance with regulatory standards. (e.g., per 29 CFR 1926.300(a) and WAC 296-155-350(1))

Item #

Inspection Item

Pass

Fail

N/A

Corrective Action Required

1

Tool casing free from cracks or damage (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

2

Power cord free from cuts, fraying, or exposed wires (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

3

Plug in good condition, no missing ground pin (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

4

Guards are in place and functional (per 29 CFR 1926.300(b))

☐

☐

☐

5

Operating controls function correctly (on/off switch, safety lock) (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

6

Properly grounded or double insulated (per 29 CFR 1926.302(a)(1))

☐

☐

☐

7

Ventilation openings clear of debris (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

8

Attachments/blades are correct for the tool and task (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

9

Attachments/blades are sharp and undamaged (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

10

Handles are secure and free from damage (per 29 CFR 1926.301(a))

☐

☐

☐

11

Air hoses free from leaks or damage (for pneumatic tools) (per 29 CFR 1926.302(b))

☐

☐

☐

12

Pressure gauges functional (for pneumatic tools) (per 29 CFR 1926.302(b))

☐

☐

☐

13

Abrasive wheels correctly mounted and guarded (per 29 CFR 1926.303(a))

☐

☐

☐

14

Wheel speed matches grinder speed (per 29 CFR 1926.303(c))

☐

☐

☐

15

Work rests properly adjusted (per 29 CFR 1926.303(c))

☐

☐

☐

16

Fuel lines and tanks free from leaks (for fuel-powered tools) (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

17

Battery packs free from damage and properly charged (for cordless tools) (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

18

Tool is clean and free from excessive grease/oil (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

19

Proper storage conditions (per 29 CFR 1926.300(a))

☐

☐

☐

20

Operator trained and authorized (per WAC 296-155-350(1))
